stocks.nameEn: The Chugoku Electric Power Co., Inc.

headlines.title: Japan Increases International Tourist Tax to 3,000 Yen From July as Crowding Controls, Regional Tourism Growth, Airport Access Relief and Visitor Safety Funding Transform Travel Policy
Top catalysts for Japan’s Nikkei 225 and Topix indices this week
Japanese Cash Flow Stocks Trading Below Fair Value Investors May Want To Watch
World shares are mixed as tech stocks in Japan and South Korea extend losses
Japan to raise tourist departure tax to 3,000 yen amid overtourism
Japan Departure Tax to Rise to 3,000 Yen on Wed.
World shares are mixed as tech stocks in Japan and South Korea extend losses

marketTone.ko: 일본 증시는 글로벌 동향과 국내 정책 변화가 복합적으로 작용하며 혼조세를 보이고 있습니다. 세계 증시가 혼조세를 나타내는 가운데, 일본과 한국의 기술주들은 하락세를 이어갔습니다. 한편, 일본은 과잉 관광 문제 해결 및 지역 관광 활성화, 방문객 안전 기금 마련 등을 위해 7월부터 국제 관광객 출국세를 3,000엔으로 인상할 예정입니다. 투자자들은 이번 주 닛케이 225 및 토픽스 지수의 주요 촉매와 함께 저평가된 현금 흐름 우량주에도 주목하고 있습니다.
marketTone.en: Japanese market sentiment is mixed today, reflecting global trends and domestic policy changes. World shares are mixed, with tech stocks in Japan and South Korea extending losses. Concurrently, Japan is set to raise its international tourist departure tax to 3,000 yen from July, a measure aimed at managing overtourism and funding regional tourism growth and visitor safety. Investors are also monitoring top catalysts for the Nikkei 225 and Topix indices this week, as well as cash flow stocks identified as trading below fair value.
